title: Testing, Release Gates, and Memory Incident Defense · Memory Trace: Memory Test Layers
summary: A critical native agent must ship a memory rewrite with compatibility, rollback, observability, and practiced incident recovery. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem memory test layers increment in production memory-safety defense dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine unit, property, integration, fault, stress, sanitizer, fuzz, ABI, resource, load, and restore evidence by risk.
Require functional, sanitizer, resource, load, and changed-workload evidence before accepting a memory optimization.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
